commands.review_summary:
The branch adds room-scoped OpenClaw crabbox supervision endpoints, a MultiCodex service token, branch preparation, docs, and helper tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings by source inspection: the branch preflight runs before runtime provisioning, defers only 403, and the PR still edits CHANGELOG.md. No live service repro was run in this read-only review.
